langgraph_topology.retry_loop: critic -> supervisor -> context_curator -> worker -> patch_integrity_gate -> sandbox -> critic

rag.evidence: normalized from state.tool_refs; each: {evidence_id, source_type, source_ref, content, trust}

retry.used_evidence_ids: ids from tool_refs cited in blocking_issues

critic_policy_engine.advisory_bypass: When worker_persona != Architect OR (tiered + basic): skip LLM, approve if exit_code in (0,None) and lint+security passed
critic_policy_engine.evidence_gate: When approved=false: require >=1 blocking_issue with evidence_refs ref_type in (lsp, sandbox). Override to approved if missing
critic_policy_engine.llm_eval: Invoke critic LLM with base + domain_block + intent_block. Parse CriticOut
critic_policy_engine.retry_decision: PASS->respond; RETRY->supervisor when not approved and should_continue and attempt < max

evidence_gating.when_blocking: Every blocking_issue MUST have evidence_refs with ref_type in valid_ref_types
evidence_gating.when_missing: Override approved to true; add nonblocking note
evidence_gating.needs_more_evidence: CriticOut.need_more_evidence; route to supervisor; emit evidence_needed (query_plan) without calling tools

retry_controller.increment_attempt: When RETRY for needs_revision (NOT when need_more_evidence)
retry_controller.diversification: revision_strategy from strategy_candidates; append to revision_strategies_tried
retry_controller.same_failure_shortcircuit: failure_id in failure_ids_seen -> skip retry, route to critic->respond
retry_controller.fail_fast: iteration >= max_iterations -> PASS (forced), route to respond

escalation_policy.trigger: Repeated RETRY with same failure_pattern; at max_attempts
escalation_policy.mode_escalation: tiered basic->advanced when iteration>0; no thrashing (do not downgrade)

monotonicity_invariants: retry.attempt only increments on needs_revision RETRY
retry.constraints only add keys; never delete

critic.decision_logic: advisory_bypass -> PASS if exit ok; else evidence_gate on LLM output; RETRY if not approved and attempt<max

examples.scenario: Code gen, sandbox passes, critic approves
Debugging intent, lint fails, blocking_issue cites sandbox

examples.outcome: PASS forced; route to respond with degraded note
